title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Flipkart Books
jsonLd.description:
Flipkart Books is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Flipkart Books:
Flipkart Books is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Flipkart Books!
